response.justification: Bogdan brings 16+ years of broad software engineering experience, Staff-level titles, and current hands-on exposure to MCP-based agentic infrastructure. However, he falls significantly short on the core GenAI requirements: Python is entirely absent from his listed skills and resume, there is no mention of RAG architectures or vector databases, and his AI-specific work appears limited to the most recent ~13 months — well below the 8-year AI-solution threshold. He reads as a strong engineer pivoting into GenAI rather than a seasoned practitioner of it.
strengths: Production-grade TypeScript and AWS CDK experience across high-throughput distributed systems
Active work on MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks at current Staff-level role
Demonstrated technical leadership through open-source projects, conference talks, and mentoring
concerns: Python is entirely absent from skills and experience despite being a primary required language
No mention of RAG architectures, vector databases, or LLM performance optimization — all required competencies
GenAI depth is limited to ~13 months, far short of the 8-year AI-driven solution requirement
